title: Harden paper-local result reference filtering
problem: The strict-v1 extraction contract blocks full paper-local identities such as Theorem 2.1 or Lemma 3.4 from becoming concept nodes, but the detector should also cover abbreviated forms and appendix-style result labels before larger runs.
proposed_change: Extend concept identity validation for abbreviations such as Thm. 2.1, Prop. 1.7, Cor. 5.2, and Lem. 3.4; support appendix and roman-number result labels such as Theorem A.1 and Proposition II.3; reject id forms such as thm_2_1 and prop_1_7; consider escalating summary-only numbered result references from warning to error in strict mode.
acceptance_criteria: Validator tests cover full, abbreviated, appendix, roman, and id-form paper-local result references; package search and allowed existing nodes filter the same identities; strict extraction runs fail before merge if these identities appear outside evidence or section provenance.

observations.context: A final identity-field scan over 16 papers, 412 nodes, and 645 edges found zero numbered result identity hits and zero theorem-like entity types. A read-only review still identified additional detector cases to harden before larger batches.
